subcodes.first_line: Exalted is He Who hath shone forth upon the Most Great Scene and spoken that whereby the mountains were scattered and the moon was cleft asunder. Verily, He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی من تجلی علی المنظر الاکبر و نطق بما نسفت الجبال و انشق القمر انه لهو
